_meta: Personal avatar + voice profile TEMPLATE. Copy this file to profile.json (same directory) and fill in your own assets. The skill loads profile.json — never this example — for 'a video of me / my avatar / in my voice' requests. profile.json is git-ignored so personal data stays off any remote.
name: Your Name

avatar.look: Describe the avatar — wardrobe, setting, lighting, framing.
rules: Keep the face, head and identity 100% unchanged and exact.
Keep the mouth unobstructed so lip-sync stays clean.
State any look preferences (e.g. stylized studio vs raw realism).

model_preferences.notes: Set your preferred talking-avatar model and any models to avoid.
